2025-04-05-json-schema-foundation.description: Create foundational JSON Schema files for Nexus wire contracts, validation tooling, and CI integration

2025-04-05-codegen-pipeline.description: Implement schema-to-code generation pipeline (JSON Schema → TypeScript + Rust)

2025-04-05-domain-models.title: Domain Models Implementation
2025-04-05-domain-models.description: Implement domain models (Key Block, Timeline, Memory, SourceAnchor) with consistency rules

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: CLI + Daemon Foundation
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.description: Implement nexus42 CLI and nexus42d daemon skeleton with auth and workspace basics

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Sync Contract Implementation
2025-04-05-sync-contract.description: Implement sync mechanism (Command, DeltaBundle, Outbox) with conflict handling

2025-04-05-acp-client.description: Integrate ACP Rust SDK, Registry, and Local API minimum contract

2025-04-05-context-assembly.description: Implement Context Assembly basic version (Neo4j + Postgres/pgvector + HybridRAG baseline)

notes.message: Phase 0 plans execute on main branch for initialization. Phase 1+ plans require feature branches.
